content: agent1: implementing 'Add Translation Metadata Tracking to trans tag' feature in src/jinja2/ext.py (InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node()). Will only touch ext.py for metadata handling. Let me know if you're also touching ext.py.

ack — I've finished edits to InternationalizationExtension.parse() and _make_node() (added trans_metadata support for note/created/modified). Done editing that class now, should be safe for you to add ConditionalI18nExtension after it.

Heads up: I ran 'git diff -- src/jinja2/ext.py > patch.txt' to save my changes now. Since we share this file, when you finish your ConditionalI18nExtension work, please regenerate patch.txt with a full 'git diff > patch.txt' so it captures both our changes together (don't overwrite with only your diff).
